intended_use: Rapid SDH is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the triage and notification of hemispheric SDH in non-enhanced head images. The device is intended to a
intended_use_full: Rapid SDH is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the triage and notification of hemispheric SDH in non-enhanced head images. The device is intended to assist trained radiologists in workflow triage by providing notification of suspected findings of hemispheric Subdural Hemorrhage (SDH) in head CT images.
target_condition: Hemispheric Subdural Hemorrhage (SDH), both acute and chronic
ground_truth: Truth established using three (3) expert neuro-radiologists
other_metrics: Median processing time to notify clinician: 45 seconds (min 33 seconds, max 107 seconds). Performance stratified by gender, age group, SDH subtype (chronic/acute/mixed), hemorrhage mix, volume, slice thickness, and CT scanner manufacturer.
